{{Infobox character
| name = Baldezar Kern
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
| name = Baldezar Kern
| aliases = Baldezar, Kern
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Sea, The Elder Empire: Shadow
| titles = Champion, Head of the Champion’s Guild, Guild Head
| abilities = unstoppable berserk state
| affiliations = Champion’s Guild
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

''See also: [[Baldezar Kern Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Baldezar Kern is the Head of the [[Champion’s Guild]] and a legendary figure recognized as one of the greatest [[Soulbound]] in history. A man of significant physical presence, he is described as broad-muscled with black hair streaked with silver. His reputation is built upon massive military feats, including the single-handed destruction of the [[South Sea Revolution]]'s armies. As a [[Soulbound]], he possesses a [[Vessel]] that allows him to enter a nearly unstoppable berserk state, though using this power is considered extremely dangerous. In combat, he utilizes a heavy mace and armor, though he has been known to appear unarmed or unarmored during negotiations. Despite his legendary status, Kern is a pragmatic leader who expresses skepticism toward those attempting to unify the Empire and maintains that he will only commit his [[Guild]]'s resources to causes he personally trusts.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Baldezar Kern]] destroyed the armies of the [[South Sea Revolution]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c26">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Kern has been vague.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Kern is the Head of the [[Champion’s Guild]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c18">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|As the Head of the [[Champion’s Guild]], Baldezar Kern was a man renowned for singlehandedly sinking an entire fleet of rebel ships. During a meeting where he was one of three proposed attendees, the [[Champion]] stood waiting at [[Calder]]'s left hand. Although his blows were strong enough to stagger a [[Great Elder]], Kern was eventually struck by [[Estyr]] with a force comparable to a [[Great Elder]]'s fist, causing his armor to crack and hammering him through the floor. This severe wounding preceded his death during the debacle in the [[Imperial]] Palace, an event so significant that [[Tyria]] used him as a comparison for her own potential demise. Following his passing, his blood was found upon a cavalry saber.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Baldezar Kern]] is the Head of the [[Champion’s Guild]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Kern is a character who laces his fingers together.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Baldezar Kern]] is a man who singlehandedly sunk an entire fleet of rebel ships.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Baldezar Kern]] has a son named [[Torrence]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Baldezar Kern]] is one of the three people proposed to attend a meeting.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Baldezar Kern]] is waiting at [[Calder]]'s left hand.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Kern is referred to as [[Champion]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Kern's full name is [[Baldezar Kern]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Baldezar Kern's armor]] began to crack.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Estyr]] punched [[Baldezar Kern]] through the floor.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Kern was hammered through the floor by a force comparable to a [[Great Elder]]'s fist.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Baldezar Kern]]'s blow was strong enough to stagger a [[Great Elder]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Baldezar Kern]] is a [[Champion]] who was severely wounded.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] misses Kern.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Kern is a person whose death occurred during the debacle in the [[Imperial]] Palace.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Kern is someone [[Tyria]] mentions as a comparison for how they might die.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The cavalry saber is spotted with the blood of [[Baldezar Kern]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A legendary former [[Guild]] Head, Baldezar Kern is a highly capable [[Soulbound]] and [[Champion]] who is considered dangerous even in the absence of his [[Vessel]]. During an encounter where he flanked [[Calder]] in armor, the calm individual demonstrated his prowess by stopping the [[Head alchemist]] with relative ease. While comparing the unfolding situation to being trapped in a burning house, Kern prepared for combat using two maces. His unique [[Soulbound]] power allows him to enter an unstoppable berserk state during battle.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Kern is considered dangerous even without his [[Vessel]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Baldezar Kern]] is a [[Champion]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Baldezar Kern]] is a [[Soulbound]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Kern is capable of stopping the [[Head alchemist]] with relative ease.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Kern is an armored individual flanking [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Baldezar Kern]] is a calm individual who compares the current situation to being locked in a burning house.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Kern's name is [[Baldezar Kern]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Kern is a [[Soulbound]] whose power allows him to enter an unstoppable berserk state.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Baldezar Kern]]'s [[Soulbound]] power is the ability to enter an unstoppable berserk state.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Baldezar Kern]] fights using two maces.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Baldezar Kern]] was a legend and a [[Guild]] Head.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c12">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Baldezar Kern]] is a notable [[Guild]] Head in terms of ability.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Estyr turned to Kern next, inclining her head. “Champion.”<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Baldezar Kern’s arms were crossed in front of him, as his armor scraped against itself as he unfolded them, nodding to her. “We’re all locked in the same burning house.”<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Soulbound]]
